title: Celebrate Christmas in July in aid of SPCA
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA)...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route SPCA (GRSPCA) is extremely excited to be hosting their White Christmas in July fundraiser, set to take place on Saturday 13 July at 10:00 in the St Augustine Hall in Meade Street.


> They have lots of awesome prizes up for grabs for best dressed, most creative table and many other fun categories.


Tickets cost R150 each and all proceeds are in support of the SPCA, its outreaches and the animals in its care.

To book your ticket, please contact Deb on 072 123 4493 / [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
